title: Ukrainian Stylized Small Caps
description: Changes the Minecraft Font to be more interesting and stylish! Supports English(latin) and Ukrainian!
body:
A stylized small caps font that supports Ukrainian. Inspired by [Small Caps Font](https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/small-caps-font) by ItsCreamMonster, with touches of Rutenia here and there. Supports latin(without any of the special characters, only the ascii file) and Ukrainian with its special characters! I have also changed supposedly all the symbols we often use. Contact me if you found something I havent changed and you want it fixed. 

(I also really liked the icon of oPixeel's [Cursive Font](https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/cursive-font), so I made myself a literal copy with just a different color of the background and with two letters in my font /////. Cursive Font's team, please contact me if you dont want me to have that similar of an icon)

Український стилізований small caps шрифт з нотками Рутенії! Підримує обидві 'ї' та 'ґ'. Також змінені нібито всі символи, якими ми часто користуємося. Зв'яжіться зі мною, якщо Ви знайшли щось не змінене та хочете, щоби я це виправив.

You can contact me in discord, here's my tag: cyantl

Ви можете зв'язатися зі мною в дискорді, ось мій теґ: cyantl
